texto: Personally I do not agree with sex being brought into science at all. The idea of 'women and science' is entirely irrelevant. Either a woman is a good scientist, or she is not; in any case she should be given opportunities, and her work should be studied from the scientific, not the sex, point of view
explicacao: Orientação direta de Hertha Ayrton sobre temas ligados a trabalho. A afirmação “Personally I do not agree with sex being brought into science at all. The idea of 'women and scie…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, discovery, point-of-view, útil em momentos de trabalho e point-of-view.
